title: Topic-tracks config schema (NAPMEM-C REQ-2)
description: Closed schema for scripts/topic-tracks/config.json. The schema alone enforces: a (0, 1] number shape (fraction01) for tag_jaccard_min, summary_jaccard_min, and common_tag_support, expressed via allOf with minimum 0, not const 0, and not minimum 1.0000000000000002; and minimum 3 for min_cluster, warn_episodes, and max_episodes. Cross-field ordering (warn_episodes >= min_cluster, max_episodes >= warn_episodes) and source-category string uniqueness are validated by loadTopicTracksConfig at runtime, not by this schema.
